How Can I Help You

Services

I design high-end web experiences that engage your audience and help you focus on scaling your business.

01

Product Design

Design user-centered solutions that tackle real-world challenges, focusing on creating meaningful experiences for users. By integrating in-depth research, strategic thinking, and creative problem-solving, I transform concepts into intuitive, visually appealing, and highly engaging digital products. My approach ensures that every design decision aligns with user needs, business goals, and measurable outcomes, delivering solutions that are both practical and impactful.

02

Web Development

Turn ideas into responsive, high-performance websites and landing pages, combining modern technologies and best practices. I ensure seamless user experiences, fast load times, and scalable solutions that adapt to business growth, engage users effectively, and drive measurable results.

03

Graphics and SEO

Create visually striking designs and optimize content for maximum online visibility. By combining creative graphics with effective SEO strategies, I help brands engage audiences, boost traffic, and achieve measurable results.

Some key projects

Works

Featured projects that have been meticulously crafted with precision to drive real results on impact.

01

Basiyo is a premier rental platform that enables hosts to earn additional income by offering their spare homes or rooms to travelers. For guests, Basiyo provides a comfortable, affordable, and unique place to stay.

As a UI/UX Designer at Basiyo, I contributed to creating intuitive and seamless experiences for both hosts and guests. My responsibilities included user research, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing to ensure the platform is easy to navigate, visually engaging, and optimized for conversions. I focused on enhancing user satisfaction, streamlining booking flows, and delivering a consistent, delightful experience across web and mobile platforms.

Basiyo
02

Basiyo is a premier rental platform that enables hosts to earn additional income by offering their spare homes or rooms to travelers. As a UI/UX Designer for the Basiyo app, I designed intuitive interfaces and streamlined user flows for both hosts and guests. My work included user research, wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity design, ensuring the app was easy to navigate, visually engaging, and optimized for a smooth booking experience. I focused on enhancing user satisfaction, simplifying interactions, and creating a consistent experience across mobile platforms.

Basiyo App
03

Paicho Pasal Private Limited was established in 2071. Main goal of the PaichoPasal is to best utilize the products of farmers, support them to product organic agricultural products, promote markets of farmers' products and provide them the direct benefits in value chain basis.

As a UI/UX Designer at Paicho Pasal, I focused on creating user-centered interfaces and improving the overall user experience. My responsibilities included conducting user research, developing wireframes and prototypes, and designing high-fidelity visuals to ensure the platform was intuitive, visually consistent, and aligned with the brand’s identity.

Paicho Pasal
04

Nepathya AI DeFi is a cutting-edge blockchain project that combines decentralized finance (DeFi) technologies with artificial intelligence to deliver secure, transparent, and intelligent financial solutions. The platform is designed to empower users through trustless, automated protocols for lending, staking, yield optimization, and risk management, all built on the immutable infrastructure of blockchain.

Nepathya Defi Wallet
